content: Supabase onAuthStateChange fires TOKEN_REFRESHED on successful silent renewal; on refresh failure it fires SIGNED_OUT instead (not an error) — app must listen for SIGNED_OUT and treat it as the 'renewal failed, warn user' case rather than a silent redirect. Known caveat: in server-side Next.js App Router contexts, onAuthStateChange listener may not fire reliably when refresh happens purely server-side; client-side listener in a root layout/provider is the reliable place to hook this.
